identity.name: Dr. Rahul Mishra
identity.department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering
identity.tagline: Building real-time, decentralized intelligent systems — from federated learning to the Internet of Drones.

biography: Dr. Rahul Mishra currently holds a faculty position in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at IIT Patna, where he also serves as the Head of the Computer Center. His research focuses on machine learning and deep learning, particularly in system deployment. He has extensively delved into real-world deployment challenges with a specific emphasis on federated learning perspectives, edge computation, and practical drone applications. His doctoral research spanned the broad domain of sensor data analytics and applied artificial intelligence.

experience.role: Assistant Professor & Head of Computer Center

experience.institution: Department of Computation and Data Science, IISc Bangalore
